creator: mark@foster.cc
text:
FWIW, I am ambivalent about whether the port is removed or not. It has 
no effect on the need for the vuxml entry.


Palle Girgensohn wrote:
> Maybe we should remove this port? AFAIK, it is not supported and 
> replaced with a web site, <http://www.bredbandskollen.se/>, only 
> available. in Swedish.
>
> Palle
